/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/app/p2p_group_owner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/network/network_sandbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/network/posix_link_configurator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/src/network/sdbus_p2p_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nexus.dir/common/system_utils/system_utils.cpp.o -o nexus  _deps/sdbus-cpp-build/libsdbus-c++.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsystemd.so
